overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic Asian-inspired urban district. The player ascends stairs and traverses an elevated walkway lined with vending machines and red lanterns, then descends through a neon-lit underpass and dark brick tunnel. The environment blends traditional architectural elements with cyberpunk aesthetics including holographic advertisements and vibrant neon signage.

agents.ego_description: climbing wide concrete stairs with white railings toward an elevated pedestrian area

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with white painted edges ascending between white railings
smooth white concrete handrails flanking both sides of the stairway
tall glass and steel towers with neon signage visible in the background
large glowing advertisements and corporate logos floating between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person ascent up a wide concrete stairway in a dense futuristic city. White railings flank the stairs while towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements rise in the background under bright midday sun.

events.description: reaches top of stairs entering open plaza with vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through open plaza past rows of colorful vending machines

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench near the vending machines

entered.detail: bright purple automated vending machines with yellow warning symbols
traditional red spherical paper lanterns hanging in a string along the building
metal railing fence along the edge of the elevated walkway
open concrete pedestrian area at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the top of the stairs, the scene opens into a sunlit elevated plaza lined with purple vending machines. Red paper lanterns hang from the building on the left while a metal safety fence borders the right edge overlooking the city below.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with traditional lanterns

agents.ego_description: strolling along covered walkway observing storefronts and hanging lanterns

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking in the distance along the covered walkway

entered.detail: mint green building exterior with large windows and traditional architectural details
wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and hanging electrical wires
simple concrete seating along the right side of the walkway
elevated walkway structure crossing above the street level

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues under partial cover of the green building facade, lined with red paper lanterns and concrete benches. Utility poles with tangled wires run along the right side while the path leads toward an overhead pedestrian bridge structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional zone approaching underpass with storefronts

events.description: descends ramp approaching underpass entrance where two people stand

agents.ego_description: walking down sloped walkway toward street level underpass with neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: two individuals standing and conversing near the underpass entrance

entered.detail: concrete stairs and ramp structure leading downward to street level
colorful shop fronts with glowing neon signs and advertisements
concrete overpass and support structure creating a covered passage
vent emitting white steam or smoke near the underpass entrance

segments.scene_description: The path descends toward a street-level underpass flanked by neon-lit storefronts on the left. Two people stand conversing near the entrance where steam rises from a vent, while the concrete overpass structure looms ahead creating a transition to a darker enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark brick pedestrian tunnel with illuminated advertisements

events.description: enters dark tunnel with artificial neon lighting and atmospheric steam
approaching bright exit light at the far end of the tunnel

agents.ego_description: moving through dark steamy tunnel with glowing advertisement panels on walls

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead through the tunnel toward the exit light

backlit poster displays with colorful advertisements lining the tunnel walls
green fluorescent tube lights mounted on the tunnel ceiling
thick white steam or fog filling the tunnel atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts dramatically to a dark enclosed brick tunnel illuminated by neon tube lights and glowing advertisement panels. Steam fills the air as the camera follows a pedestrian toward the bright exit light visible at the tunnel's end, creating a stark contrast between the dark passage and the approaching daylight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, open urban ascent into a dark, neon-lit subterranean passage. It begins by climbing a wide concrete stairway flanked by white railings, with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements looming under a bright midday sun. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens into a sunlit elevated plaza lined with purple vending machines and red paper lanterns before continuing along a walkway beneath a green building facade and tangled utility wires. The path then descends toward a street-level underpass where steam rises from vents near neon-lit storefronts, leading the camera away from the daylight and into a looming concrete structure. Finally, the environment shifts dramatically into a dark, enclosed brick tunnel illuminated by glowing neon tubes and advertisement panels, following a pedestrian toward the bright light of the exit.
